summaryFilipino: Available si Kino para sa future job, client, recruiter, employer, at stakeholder conversations. Pwede siyang ma-contact sa email na kinoilustrisimo.021@gmail.com, mobile number na +639927911469, o Facebook na https://www.facebook.com/palonpon.kino.
availability: Available for future job and client opportunities related to Python automation, dashboards, reporting, and data operations.
preferredContactMethod: Email is preferred for project requests and professional inquiries. Mobile and Facebook are also available for direct contact.

projectRequest.mailSubject: New project request from Kino portfolio
projectRequest.notes: Configured with FormSubmit for automatic email delivery to Kino. The first live submission may require email activation. You can switch provider to formspree or emailjs later if preferred.

privacyNote: Do not disclose residential address, credentials, salary, debtor information, account-level data, internal URLs, or confidential client information.
